name: backfill-reviews.test
purpose: Integration tests for backfill-reviews.ts — overlap resolution, skip-list exclusion, completeness tiers, v1 migration merge, retro extraction, idempotency; uses mock data.
notes: Compiled to dist/__tests__/backfill-reviews.test.js via tsconfig.test.json. Loads dist via dynamic require(path.resolve(PROJECT_ROOT, 'scripts/reviews/dist/...')). Uses findProjectRoot() pattern common to all TS tests in this dir.

name: build-enforcement-manifest.test
purpose: Unit tests for build-enforcement-manifest.ts — slugify, parseCodePatterns, scanRegexRules, scanEslintRules, scanSemgrepRules, buildMechanisms; file I/O via temp dirs.
notes: Uses beforeEach/afterEach with os.tmpdir() for isolated file I/O. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: completeness.test
purpose: Unit tests for lib/completeness.ts — hasField() and validateCompleteness() in isolation; pure functions, no file I/O.
notes: Fully portable — tests pure utility functions with no SoNash-specific paths or IDs. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: dedup-debt.test
purpose: Unit tests for dedup-debt.ts — dedupReviewSourced() pure function tested with mock data; covers MASTER_DEBT.jsonl deduplication logic.
notes: DEBT-NNNN ID format and MASTER_DEBT.jsonl are SoNash-specific — test not portable. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: enforcement-manifest.test
purpose: Unit tests for lib/enforcement-manifest.ts — MechanismsSchema, EnforcementRecordSchema, classifyCoverage(), isStale(); end-to-end manifest file integrity lives in tests/enforcement-manifest.test.ts.
notes: Companion end-to-end test at tests/enforcement-manifest.test.ts (outside this scope). Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: generate-claude-antipatterns.test
purpose: Unit tests for lib/generate-claude-antipatterns.ts — generateAntiPatternsTable() and updateClaudeMd() in dry-run mode; prevents live CLAUDE.md writes.
notes: CLAUDE.md Section 4 structure is SoNash-specific. Uses os.tmpdir() for I/O isolation. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: generate-fix-template-stubs.test
purpose: Unit tests for lib/generate-fix-template-stubs.ts — generateFixTemplateStub() and appendFixTemplateStubs() in dry-run mode; all file I/O via temp dirs.
notes: FIX_TEMPLATES.md path is SoNash-specific. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: parse-review.test
purpose: Tests for lib/parse-review.ts — heading parsing, table parsing, field extraction, completeness tiers, known-ID sets; uses inline markdown strings as fixtures.
notes: KNOWN_SKIPPED_IDS and KNOWN_DUPLICATE_IDS are SoNash review history. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: promote-patterns.test
purpose: Unit tests for lib/promote-patterns.ts pure functions — detectRecurrence, filterAlreadyPromoted, categorizePattern, generateRuleSkeleton; full promotePatterns() in dry-run only.
notes: CODE_PATTERNS.md path is SoNash-specific. Two test files cover same target (see promotion-pipeline.test.ts). Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: promotion-pipeline.test
purpose: Integration tests for the promotion pipeline (lib/promote-patterns.ts) — detectRecurrence, filterAlreadyPromoted, categorizePattern, generateRuleSkeleton, and full pipeline integration; uses inline test data.
notes: Second test file covering promote-patterns.ts — unit + integration split. Both compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: read-write-jsonl.test
purpose: Consolidated unit tests for lib/read-jsonl.ts and lib/write-jsonl.ts — readValidatedJsonl() and appendRecord() via compiled dist; all I/O isolated to temp directories.
notes: Tests pure I/O utilities — no SoNash-specific paths. Portable with the lib files it covers. Imports zod for schema validation in tests. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: render-reviews-to-md.test
purpose: Unit tests for render-reviews-to-md.ts — renderReviewRecord() and renderAllRecords(); imports directly from TS source (not dist).
notes: UNIQUE: imports from '../render-reviews-to-md' (TypeScript source) rather than dist/. This is the only test in this dir that does a direct TS import instead of require(dist/...). The import pattern means it compiles with the source together. Section markers in the rendered output contain SoNash-specific text (sanitize_fields).

name: schemas.test
purpose: Tests for all 7 schema files in lib/schemas/ — valid minimal input, valid full input, invalid inputs (missing required fields, bad enum values, empty strings, null, wrong types); loaded via compiled dist barrel index.
notes: Covers all 7 entity schemas plus shared/index. lifecycle-score.ts has a 20-value SoNash-specific category enum tested here. Sanitize those enum values for JASON-OS port. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: verify-enforcement-manifest.test
purpose: Unit tests for verify-enforcement-manifest.ts — readManifest(), getActualRegexRules(), getActualEslintRules(), getActualSemgrepRules(); uses temp dirs and inline content.
notes: Tests SoNash-specific enforcement manifest scanning — eslint-plugin-sonash, .semgrep/rules paths. Not portable. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: write-deferred-items.test
purpose: Tests for write-deferred-items.ts — DeferredItemRecord creation and writing; uses temp directories for file isolation.
notes: Output path data/ecosystem-v2/deferred-items.jsonl is SoNash-specific — sanitize. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: write-invocation.test
purpose: Tests for write-invocation.ts — InvocationRecord writing to invocations.jsonl; uses temp directories for file isolation.
notes: output path data/ecosystem-v2/invocations.jsonl is SoNash-specific. High-value port candidate — write-invocation is consumed by 19 skills. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: write-retro-record.test
purpose: Tests for write-retro-record.ts — RetroRecord writing to retros.jsonl; uses temp directories for file isolation.
notes: .claude/state/retros.jsonl path is SoNash-specific project-scoped path. Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: write-review-record.test
purpose: Unit tests for write-review-record.ts — writeReviewRecord() and getNextReviewId(); uses temp directories for isolated file I/O and execFileSync for CLI mode tests.
notes: .claude/state/reviews.jsonl is SoNash project path. Uses execFileSync for CLI invocation test — shells_out in test. Includes SEC-008 path-traversal assertion guard (assertWithinRoot). Compiled to dist/__tests__/.

name: cross-db-validation.test
purpose: Functional test — cross-database validation between reviews.jsonl and review-metrics.jsonl; regression guard for retro action item #3. Tests runCrossDbValidation() logic for mismatch detection.
notes: Tests logic in scripts/review-lifecycle.js (D6b scope), NOT a direct reviews subsystem file. Is placed in __tests__/ but tests an out-of-scope file. NOT compiled to dist/__tests__/ — is a plain CJS .js file run directly. review-metrics.jsonl is SoNash-specific. v1.0 2026-03-18.

name: disposition-validation.test
purpose: Functional test — disposition integrity validation; verifies validateDispositions() flags total>0 but fixed+deferred+rejected==0; regression guard for retro action item #14.
notes: Tests logic spanning review-lifecycle.js and write-review-record.ts. Placed in __tests__/ but cross-scope. NOT compiled to dist/__tests__/ — plain CJS .js. v1.0 2026-03-18.

name: pipeline-consistency.test
purpose: Integration test — verifies all review pipeline scripts agree on file paths; prevents split-brain bug where write-review-record.ts wrote to ecosystem-v2 while render+lifecycle read from .claude/state/.
notes: Tests path consistency across multiple scripts — requires reading source files and asserting hardcoded paths. v1.0 2026-03-18. NOT compiled to dist/__tests__/ — plain CJS .js.
